positive.prompt: How should I branch and PR this change?
This fix is ready, walk me through getting it merged the standard way
Create a branch for this work and open a pull request when it is done

negative.prompt: Which model tier should the CI review agent pin?
The @claude workflow went green but never opened a PR

evals.prompt: There is an off-by-one bug in src/discount.py: the docstring says 30 days or more qualifies, but the code requires more than 30. Fix it and get the fix into main following our release discipline.
evals.expected_output: A feature branch carrying the one-line fix, a PR prepared or attempted (the workspace has no remote), and no direct commits to main
expectations: The fix lands on a feature branch; no new commits are made directly on main
A pull request is prepared or attempted rather than merging into main locally
The change is kept scoped to the single comparison fix in src/discount.py
